title: QA Analyst
description: Asana is hiring a QA Analyst to ensure the reliability and quality of our work management platform. You'll design comprehensive test strategies, execute testing across web and mobile platforms, and collaborate with engineering teams. This hybrid role offers the opportunity to impact the experience of millions of Asana users globally.
responsibilities: Design and execute comprehensive test plans covering functionality, performance, and usability
Write test automation scripts using Python or JavaScript; maintain test automation frameworks
Conduct regression testing and performance testing; identify and document defects
Collaborate with product managers and engineers on testing requirements
Monitor quality metrics and test coverage; provide recommendations for improvement

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
skills: Test automation using Python, JavaScript, or similar languages
Experience with testing frameworks and CI/CD pipelines
Proficiency with API testing and SQL

benefits: Comprehensive health, vision, and dental coverage
